summary: OVERNIGHT RUN. INFRA FIXED: root cause of all writer slowness was a failing Kingston A400 SATA SSD mirrored with the NVMe in pool 'fast' (8-52s write latency) — DETACHED (NVMe had full copy). Then VACUUM completed (16G->13G, freelist 0). Migrated sifter.db+graph.db to ZFS recordsize=16K dataset (fast/siftersearch-db) + synchronous=NORMAL (db.js 2.117.0). Result: writes 29x faster (10k random updates 705ms vs 20734ms). /tank backup verified at /tank/backups/siftersearch/pre-16k-migration-20260618T034508Z. Old files kept at /fast/siftersearch-data/. Entity DB: 4488 entities incl 138 new martyr-roll persons; graph mentions 17925.
overnight_sequence: 1) STEP 2 extract remaining 672 paras (654 footnotes idx 1424-2081 mostly definitions/translations/Quran-citations + few named entities; 13 DB narrative + 5 GPB narrative = high-value). Resolve mentions to EXISTING roster, queue new candidates (don't auto-create from footnotes), mark ALL enriched. 2) STEP 3 deep research every person(~1159)+work(~337): merge dupes (AI adjudication, never keyword), join aliases/kinship, gather cross-corpus. 3) STEP 4 live-build review page from DB (tabs per type, sections per DB chapter by first-introduction, collapsible records) — THE morning deliverable. Plan in scripts/wip/corrections/DB-ENTITY-ROADMAP.md (top).
operational_attention: 1) pool 'fast' now SINGLE NVMe, NO redundancy — re-attach a 2nd NVMe (zpool attach) + retire A400. 2) updater FROZEN (pm2 stop siftersearch-updater) — restart + re-park 4 graph workers when ready. 3) writer path FAST now — normal HTTP write path works, no worker-stop workaround needed.
step4_review_page: LIVE. In admin panel: /admin/entities (bottom nav 'Entity Review', auth-only, no key, live-refresh). Also direct: /api/admin/entity-review?key=$INTERNAL_API_KEY. Route accepts admin JWT or key.
step2_status: COMPLETE — two-books pending=0. Narrative 18 paras + 654 footnotes extracted. 1943 content-extraction mentions to existing entities. 644 new candidates queued (scripts/wip/corrections/content-new-candidates.json) for Step 3 deliberate creation.
step3_status: IN PROGRESS. Merge/dedup DONE: 4488->4389 entities (99 merged: 93 same-name + 4 cross-name; central figures consolidated — Bahá'u'lláh/the Báb(924m)/'Abdu'l-Bahá/Jesus/Vaḥíd single). 5 bare-name buckets HELD (Aḥmad/Siyyid Muḥammad/Mírzá Mihdí/Muftí/Mujtahid) — re-resolve by reading, NOT matching. mergeEntities fixed (3 bugs: unique mentions, full FK web, unique relations). Backups: /tank/.../pre-merge-*.
step3_descriptions: GPB-anchored descriptions. ABANDONED the mechanical/substring gather (it mis-attributes: a GPB sentence naming entity B while describing entity A via 'this Book'/pronoun got filed under B — e.g. the Íqán's 'unequalled...except the Aqdas' landed on the Aqdas). USER ABSOLUTE RULE: NEVER mechanical/keyword matching to disambiguate or attribute — always reading comprehension. Cleared all 853 mechanical descriptions (martyr provenance restored). Flagship works Íqán/Aqdas/Hidden Words set CORRECTLY by reading (verbatim, right subject). REMAINING: gather verbatim GPB descriptors for ~850 person+work entities via READING AGENTS (subagents comprehend which entity each characterization is about, quote verbatim, preserve Shoghi Effendi's adjectives/texture like 'preeminent doctrinal work'). NO string-matching.
remaining_step3: 1) Reading-agent GPB-description pass for person+work (verbatim, comprehension attribution). 2) Re-resolve 5 held bare-name buckets by context. 3) Create 644 footnote/narrative new-entity candidates (content-new-candidates.json) deliberately.
